---
title: "Publications"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    css: ../../styles.css
---

Below is a selected list of publications.

<div class="about-icon-links">
  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Yulia_Tyukhova?ev=hdr_xprf" target="_blank" aria-label="ResearchGate">
    <img src="../../images/rg.png" alt="ResearchGate" class="rg-icon" />
  </a>
  <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Ev9KmxoAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" aria-label="Google Scholar"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i></a>
</div>

## Journal Articles

* **[Discomfort glare in outdoor nighttime environments after dark - A review of methods, measures, and models](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.buildenv.2024.111850)**
  Y. Tyukhova
  *Building and Environment*, 263, 111850, 2024

* **[Subjective and pupil responses to discomfort glare from small, high-luminance light sources](https://doi.org/10.1177/1477153518772000)**
  Y. Tyukhova, C.E. Waters
  *Lighting Research & Technology*, 2019

* **[Discomfort glare from small, high-luminance light sources against a dark surround](https://doi.org/10.1080/15502724.2018.1434415)**
  Y. Tyukhova, C.E. Waters
  *Leukos*, 2018

* **Study on subjective and pupil responses to discomfort glare from small, high-luminance light sources in outdoor nighttime environments**
  Y. Tyukhova, C.E. Waters
  *IES conference proceedings*, 2016

* **[An assessment of high dynamic range luminance measurements with LED lighting](https://doi.org/10.1080/15502724.2014.861279)**
  Y. Tyukhova, C.E. Waters
  *Leukos*, 10:2, 87-99, 2014

* **An assessment of high dynamic range luminance measurements with LED lighting**
  Y. Tyukhova, C.E. Waters
  *IES conference proceedings*, 2012

* **Lighting for sculptures and 3D objects**
  Y. Tyukhova, S. Lebedkova
  *MPEI Herald*, issue 3, 75-81, 2011

## Standards and White Papers

* **[Discomfort Glare Models in Outdoor Environments After Dark](https://ies.org/fires/discomfort-glare-models-in-outdoor-environments-after-dark/)**
  Y. Tyukhova, 2025
  *Forum for Illumination Research, Engineering, and Science (FIRES)* (reviewed by the Editorial Board of the IES)

* **["Off-roadway sign luminance"](https://store.ies.org/product/rp-39-19-recommended-practice-off-roadway-sign-luminance/?v=0b3b97fa6688)**, ANSI/IES RP-39-19, member

* **["Discomfort caused by glare from luminaires with a non-uniform source luminance"](https://cie.co.at/publications/discomfort-caused-glare-luminaires-non-uniform-source-luminance)**, CIE 232:2019, advisor

## Patents

* **[Luminaires with transition zones for glare control](https://patents.google.com/patent/US10309588B2/en)**
  US10309588B2
  Application granted June 4, 2019
  Inventors: Yulia Tyukhova, et al.

* **Installation for research of lighting quality for 3D objects**
  Russian Federation Utility model number: 102447
  Issued September 2, 2010
  Inventors: Yulia Tyukhova, Dr. Svetlana Lebedkova, Nikolay Zakharov

## Magazine Articles

* **[Honoring the Past, Shaping the Future: The Story of IES Awards](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/03606325261420953?icid=int.sj-full-text.similar-articles.3)**
  Y. Tyukhova, February 2026
  *LD+A (IES magazine)*, p. 20-23
  A history article on the four prestigious awards of the IES.

* **[EP Program helps to find the 'Range'.](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/036063252005000416?icid=int.sj-abstract.similar-articles.9)**
  Y. Tyukhova, April 2020
  *LD+A (IES magazine)*, p. 56-58
  An article about the importance of the Emerging Professional program at the IES.

* **[Leadership without formal authority](https://www.ies.org/lda/leadership-without-formal-authority/)**
  Y. Tyukhova, April 2017
  *LD+A (IES magazine)*
  An article featured in the Emerging Professional column of LD+A.

## Dissertation and Thesis

* **[Discomfort glare from small, high luminance light sources in outdoor nighttime environments](https://digitalcommons.unl.edu/dissertations/AAI3738962/)**
  Y. Tyukhova
  *University of Nebraska-Lincoln*, 2015

* **[The assessment of high dynamic range luminance measurements with LED lighting](https://digitalcommons.unl.edu/archengdiss/17/)**
  Master's Thesis
  *The University of Nebraska-Lincoln*, 2012
